testcase.name: 1. Category Filtering

Category Filtering &amp#27;[90m# features/Amazon.feature:9&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user is on the store homepage&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.StoreSteps.navigateToStore()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user clicks on the &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Laptops"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m category&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.StoreSteps.filterCategory(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe product list should update to show laptops&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# steps.StoreSteps.verifyCategoryUpdate()&amp#27;[0m
